name: Mensa Selas
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) female wearing leveled light armor consisting of cuirass and boots, with a 25% chance each of also wearing greaves and gauntlets. Also wears leveled lower-class pants. Armed with a leveled bow with arrows and a dagger.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: hostile, criminal, violent
Role: Mensa Selas is a bandit camped out near Fisherman's Rock north of Leyawiin with her gang members Mogens Wind-Shifter, J'Baasha, and Ayisha. She follows Mogens' orders and will attack on command.
Home Location Information: The bandit camp near Fisherman's Rock, north of Leyawiin.
Daily Routine: Mensa spends all of her time wandering around the camp, never stopping to eat or sleep.
Gang Hierarchy: Mensa operates as part of a bandit gang led by Mogens Wind-Shifter. When Mogens gives the order to attack, she and her companions will follow through without hesitation.
Personality - The Obedient Bandit: Mensa is a hostile criminal who operates as part of an organized bandit gang. She follows orders from Mogens and is willing to engage in violent attacks when commanded. Her constant vigilance around the camp and readiness for combat demonstrate her commitment to the bandit lifestyle.
author: Bethesda
